entries.title: COMMENTARY ON EXODUS 3:3 on exodus 3:11
entries.excerpt: Moses said, "Who am I to go before Pharaoh?" Although I have a royal title, I will not be received by him. And now that I do the work of a simple shepherd, who will allow me to go before Pharaoh? And even if I were let in, what importance would he see in me to believe my words?
